title: SkyrimNet Knowledge Pack
description: A .sknpack file exported from SkyrimNet's knowledge pack UI. Contains a named collection of conditional knowledge entries that get injected into NPC prompts when their decorator expressions match. Always machine-generated by SkyrimNet's Export action — contributors never hand-author this file. This schema is syntactic only; semantic validation (valid decorator names in condition_expr, referenced NPC groups exist, etc.) runs inside SkyrimNet at export time and, when available, via a dashboard-side validator at publish time.

name.description: Human-readable pack name set in the SkyrimNet UI. Identifies this pack among the user's installed packs.

author.description: Author name as recorded inside the pack. Informational only — the authoritative author for hub publishing is the GitHub username at the plugin directory level. These may differ (pack author is a display name, plugin author is a GitHub username).

description.description: Free-form description of the pack set in the SkyrimNet UI.

version.description: Pack's internal semver, independent of the enclosing plugin's manifest.version.

format_version.description: Format version of the .sknpack file structure itself. Currently 1. Unknown format versions are rejected by validate.yml until the hub is updated to support them — SkyrimNet's format is expected to evolve, at which point this schema will either accept multiple versions or mark older versions as deprecated.

exported_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when SkyrimNet exported this pack. Informational.

entry_count.description: Redundant with entries.length, but preserved as-exported. validate.yml may enforce entry_count == entries.length.

npc_groups.description: Metadata for any NPC groups referenced by entries via is_in_npc_group() in their condition_expr. Populated automatically by SkyrimNet when an entry uses a group condition. Each object is the group's name plus a description, denormalized into the pack for display and reviewer context (so reviewers don't need to look up group definitions separately).

entries.description: The knowledge entries themselves. This is the meat of the pack and what the agent review scans for forbidden content.

type.description: Category of the entry as set in the SkyrimNet UI. Observable values at time of writing. May expand in future SkyrimNet versions — if new types appear, this enum will need updating.

display_name.description: Short label shown in the SkyrimNet UI when listing entries. Not injected into the prompt.

content.description: The actual knowledge text that will be injected into NPC prompts when the condition matches. This is what agent review scans for forbidden content (illegal, hate, obfuscation, spam, NSFW flag accuracy).

condition_expr.description: Decorator expression that must evaluate true for this entry to be injected. Uses the same decorator function language as action eligibility rules: `is_in_faction(actorUUID, "X")`, `decnpc(actorUUID).race == "Imperial"`, `is_in_npc_group(actorUUID, "Pinned")`, `get_quest_stage("MQ103") >= 10`, and so on, combined with `and`/`or`/`not`/parens. Empty string means no condition (always applies — but see also always_inject). Semantic validity of decorator names is not checked here.

always_inject.description: If true, the entry is injected regardless of condition_expr evaluation. The exact interaction between always_inject and condition_expr is SkyrimNet's internal concern — we track the field as-exported without enforcing semantics.

importance.description: Weight/priority 0.0-1.0 (shown in-UI as a percentage). Influences ranking when multiple entries match. Exact semantics are SkyrimNet's concern.

emotion.description: Free-form emotion tag set by the author in the UI. Empty string when unset.

location.description: Free-form location tag set by the author in the UI. Empty string when unset.

tags.description: Free-form tags set in the UI for the author's own organization.
